title: Simulation Engineer, AI & Data
company_focus: Digital engineering platform for HPC and simulation
description:
Rescale is pioneering the future of engineering and
scientific discovery. As the leader in digital engineering,
we’re transforming how products are developed—through
intelligent automation, applied AI, data management, and the
integration of the world’s largest network of engineering
and R&D applications. Joining Rescale means becoming part of
a diverse, collaborative, and mission-driven team that’s
unlocking faster innovation across industries like
aerospace, energy, life sciences, and manufacturing. We’re
solving complex challenges that traditional HPC can’t—and
we’re seeking passionate, curious minds to help build the
next wave of breakthroughs.

We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Simulation
Engineer, AI and Data to join our team.

At Rescale, this means you will work on and impact:

- Become an expert in the Rescale platform and its application
  to customer workflows.
- Solve complex Simulation AI problems for customers on our
  platform.
- Integrate cutting-edge AI technologies into CAE workflows.
- Collaborate with a dynamic and agile development team.
- Engage directly with customers to understand their needs and
  provide tailored solutions.
- Contribute to the development and enhancement of our AI
  software products.
- Stay updated with the latest advancements in Simulation and
  AI technologies.
- Participate in code reviews and provide constructive
  feedback to peers.

What we’re looking for:

- Advanced degree in Machine Learning, Computer Science,
  Aerospace Engineering, or a related field (preferably a
  PhD).
- 5-10 years of industry experience.
- Strong problem-solving skills and self-motivation.
- Software development experience
- Expertise in Simulation and applying AI technology to CAE
  workflows.
- Proficiency in key skills: PyTorch, Modulus, PyG,
  CAE/CFD/FEA, REST API development, CUDA, Kubernetes, and
  more.
- Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks
  effectively.
- Passion for continuous learning and professional
  development.

Rescale is an equal opportunities employer and welcomes
applications from all qualified persons regardless of their
race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation
or age. As part of our standard hiring process for new
employees, employment with Rescale will be contingent upon
successful completion of a comprehensive background check.
Here at Rescale, we are committed to being transparent in
our policies around candidate privacy. For more details on
the information Rescale collects in your application, please
view the Rescale Applicant Privacy Policy here.
responsibilities: Solve complex Simulation AI problems for customers on the platform
Integrate cutting-edge AI technologies into CAE workflows
Engage directly with customers to understand their needs and provide tailored solutions
Contribute to the development and enhancement of AI software products
Collaborate with dynamic and agile development team
Stay updated with latest advancements in Simulation and AI technologies
Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to peers
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly integrating AI technologies into
CAE workflows, solving Simulation AI problems, and
developing AI software products. The position requires
hands-on work with PyTorch, Modulus, and CUDA for building
and applying AI models to engineering simulations.
